summary:
The way health information is presented—such as using visual aids or interactive formats—affects patients' comprehension and willingness to participate. In antenatal settings, clear and engaging presentations improve informed consent and increase recruitment by enhancing accessibility and relevance.  

Note: This summary strictly adheres to only clinically significant points related to the impact of processing fluency on recruitment and participation.
